top_issue: Data coverage limitations and estimation issues
evidence_snippet_1: Jyske Bank-koncernens politik for ansvarlige og bæredygtige investeringer ekskluderer selskaber med mere end 5% af omsætningen fra termisk kul og tjæresand fra vores investeringsunivers
evidence_snippet_2: Datadækning = 96%

top_issue: Complex disclosure with multiple targets and progress metrics
evidence_snippet_1: Jyske Bank-koncernen har langsigtede mål i overensstemmelse med Parisaftalens mål om netto nuludledning i 2050 for 100% af vores AUM på vegne af kunder.
evidence_snippet_2: Vi har en målsætning om at reducere CO 2 -aftrykket for vores aktieinvesteringer med 75% i 2030 i forhold til 2019. Ultimo 2024 var vores aktieinvesteringers CO 2 -aftryk reduceret med 65%.

top_issue: Engagement program described but no explicit targets
evidence_snippet_1: I løbet af 2024 deltog Jyske Bank sammen med andre investorer i Sustainalytics normbaserede engagement-program på 137 sager vedrørende overtrædelse af internationale konventioner og normer
evidence_snippet_2: Jyske Banks politik for ansvarlig og bæredygtig investering fravælger investeringer i konventionsomfattede våben og tager stilling til normbrud

top_issue: Ongoing engagement program related to compliance monitoring
evidence_snippet_1: I løbet af 2024 deltog Jyske Bank sammen med andre investorer i Sustainalytics normbaserede engagement-program på 137 engagementsager vedrørende overtrædelse af internationale konventioner og normer
evidence_snippet_2: 81 af disse sager vedrører virksomheder uden menneskerettigheder og arbejdstagerrettigheder, 23 sager vedrører miljøforhold, og 18 sager vedrører forretningsetik

top_issue: Action described but no explicit target or measurable objective
evidence_snippet_1: Jyske Bank ekskluderer konsekvent i vores egen porteføljeforvaltning selskaber med aktiviteter, der kan relateres til kontroversielle våben
evidence_snippet_2: Andel af investeringer i investeringsmodtagende virksomheder, der er involveret i fremstilling eller salg af kemiske våben og kontroversielle våben = 0,00%

top_issue: Partial data coverage and pending targets for some asset classes
evidence_snippet_1: For realkreditobligationer i investeringsforeningsafdelinger administreret i koncernen er CO2e-aftrykket reduceret med 51% siden 2019, og delmålet om 40% reduktion i 2030 er således allerede opfyldt.
evidence_snippet_2: Der er ikke fastsat reduktionsmål på mellemlangt sigte for denne del af AUM, da vi vurderer, at data og metode ikke er tilstrækkeligt udviklet til at kunne udarbejde en retvisende beregning og dermed levere en valid målsætning.

top_issue: Data quality and coverage limitations noted
evidence_snippet_1: Oplysninger om udstedernes drivhusgasemissioner er også identificeret som en vigtig PAI-indikator, og vil anvendes på afdelinger med tilstrækkelig datakvalitet og -tilgængelighed.
evidence_snippet_2: BankInvest har sat en 55 % reduktionsmålsætning på CO2-aftrykket fra ultimo 2019-2030 for en andel af vores investeringer. Denne andel øges til 100% inden 2040.

top_issue: Low data clarity and coverage with unclear quantitative targets
evidence_snippet_1: BankInvest har i 2024 lanceret nye retningslinjer for investeringer i fossile
evidence_snippet_2: Ovenstående foranstaltninger er med til at reducere eksponering mod aktiviteter, som anses for at have betydelig negativ indvirkning på miljøet

top_issue: Unclear details on specific actions and impact
evidence_snippet_1: BankInvest har i 2024 lanceret nye retningslinjer for investeringer i fossile
evidence_snippet_2: Ovenstående foranstaltninger er med til at reducere eksponering mod aktiviteter, som anses for at have betydelig negativ indvirkning på miljøet

top_issue: Actions described but no measurable target provided
evidence_snippet_1: Hvis screeningen viser, at en virksomhed bryder med disse principper, vil BIAM enten frasælge investeringen, eller opstarte en dialog med henblik på at søge at påvirke virksomheden til at tage ansvar og ændre adfærd.
evidence_snippet_2: Alle investeringer gennemgår en normbaseret screening for brud på FN's Global Compact-principper og Organisationen for Økonomisk Samarbejde og Udviklings (OECD's) retningslinjer for multinationale virksomheder.

top_issue: No measurable target or planned actions, only a stated general prohibition
evidence_snippet_1: BIAM har et generelt forbud mod at investere i virksomheder involveret i produktion af kontroversielle våben
evidence_snippet_2: Andel af investeringer i modtagende virksomheder, der er 0,00% 0,00% - Ingen ændring siden sidste rapportering.

top_issue: Targets and actions stated but lack detailed implementation specifics
evidence_snippet_1: We are a signatory to the Net Zero Asset Managers Initiative and committed to supporting the goal of net zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050 or sooner
evidence_snippet_2: we have an organisational-wide target to achieve a 50% reduction in the weighted average carbon intensity (WACI) of our investments (Scope 1+2 tCO2e/mEur revenue) and a 2025 target to ensure that 80% of our top 200 largest carbon footprint contributors are on a Paris-aligned trajectory or else subject to engagement to become aligned

top_issue: Planned actions described without explicit measurable target; data coverage limitations noted
evidence_snippet_1: In 2024 NAM strengthened its Responsible Investment Policy related to coal activities, including stronger investment restrictions on coal mining, coal power expansion, and generation without phase-out commitments.
evidence_snippet_2: Going forward we will continue engagement efforts to encourage Paris alignment of investee companies, enhance existing suite of climate-related tools and continue to introduce additional investment products with climate overlays.

top_issue: Actions described but no measurable targets
evidence_snippet_1: If a company is identified in this screening process, an internal assessment of the company is initiated and potential actions considered
evidence_snippet_2: During 2024, 13 issuers were flagged for allegations of violating international norms. In depth engagement processes were conducted with 5 of the issuers. NAM co-filed shareholder resolutions for one of the issuers’ 2024 AGM.

top_issue: Low data coverage and partial action details
evidence_snippet_1: During 2024, 13 issuers were flagged for allegations of violating international norms. In depth engagement processes were conducted with 5 of the issuers.
evidence_snippet_2: Share of investments in investee companies without policies to monitor compliance with the UNGC principles or OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises or grievance/ complaints handling mechanisms to address violations ... coverage: 87,64%

top_issue: Exclusion actions and screening process described but no future plans detailed
evidence_snippet_1: Our Nordea-branded investment strategies do not invest in companies that are involved in the production or development of chemical weapons and controversial weapons
evidence_snippet_2: At the end of 2024, NAM had excluded a total of 91 issuers due to their involvement with controversial weapons. Two of these issuers were excluded during 2024.

top_issue: Generic policy description with limited specific actions and data coverage concerns
evidence_snippet_1: Companies identified by the PAI engine as outliers on specific indicators or that exhibit high adverse impact across several indicators, are analysed further by our Responsible Investment team and a recommendation for action is made to our Responsible Investment Committee (RIC).
evidence_snippet_2: The PAI indicators that we consider are aligned with our ESG positions and are subject to data quality and availability.

top_issue: Unclear direct link between actions/targets and indicator; data quality concerns
evidence_snippet_1: Through the commitments of Danske Bank A/S (“Danske Bank”) under the Net Zero Asset Manager’s Initiative, Danske Invest Management is committed to contribute to the goals of the Paris Agreement and to achieve net zero GHG emissions by 2050.
evidence_snippet_2: Coverage: Data coverage is 87% of the eligible investments which means a total coverage of ... Scope 3 GHG emissions are subject to more estimations than Scope 1 and 2. ... Significant uncertainties therefore exist in relation to data reliability for Scope 3, which together with high volatility impact the reported impacts.

top_issue: Data coverage limitations and estimation assumptions
evidence_snippet_1: Coverage: Data coverage is 87% of the eligible investments which means a total coverage of around 73% of all investments.
evidence_snippet_2: Where carbon emission data was not available on an investee company ... it has effectively been assumed that investee companies without data have the carbon footprint of the investee companies with data.

top_issue: No specific actions or targets; data coverage limitations noted
evidence_snippet_1: Actions taken and actions planned and targets set: none described
evidence_snippet_2: Data coverage Consumption (A): 59% of the eligible investments which means a total coverage of around 50% of all investments. Production (B): Data coverage is 84% of the eligible investments which means a total coverage of around 71% of all investments. Data assumptions and quality: ... estimations applied by ISS ESG.

top_issue: Data uncertainty and estimation issues noted
evidence_snippet_1: As there can be companies violating UNGC principles/OECD guidelines that have not yet been identified/reported, there is a degree of uncertainty in the data.
evidence_snippet_2: Planned actions for year 2025: There will be continued efforts to enhance screenings and methodologies relating to human rights impacts and risks.

top_issue: Low data coverage and estimation uncertainty
evidence_snippet_1: Active Ownership: By the end of 2024, more than 200 engagements have been tied to the topic of lack of processes and compliance mechanisms to monitor
evidence_snippet_2: Planned actions for year 2025: There will be continued efforts to enhance screenings and methodologies relating to human rights impacts and risks.

top_issue: Planned refinements to exclusion policy and data coverage limitations
evidence_snippet_1: Exclusions are operated for companies involved in controversial weapons. The exclusion category was adjusted during 2024 to allow for investments in companies involved in activities associated to nuclear weapons within the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons.
evidence_snippet_2: Planned actions for year 2025: Further refinements to the exclusion on controversial weapons are to be expected in order to align the approach with the need to procure more investments into defence.

top_issue: Low data coverage and complex target linkage
evidence_snippet_1: We are a signatory to the Net Zero Asset Managers Initiative and committed to supporting the goal of net zero greenhouse gas emissions by 2050 or sooner
evidence_snippet_2: we have an organisational-wide target to achieve a 50% reduction in the weighted average carbon intensity (WACI) of our investments (Scope 1+2 tCO2e/mEur revenue) and a 2025 target to ensure that 80% of our top 200 largest carbon footprint contributors are on a Paris-aligned trajectory or else subject to engagement to become aligned

top_issue: Data coverage limitations and mixed clarity on targets and actions
evidence_snippet_1: In 2024 NAM strengthened its Responsible Investment Policy related to coal activities, including stronger investment restrictions on coal mining, coal power expansion, and generation without phase-out commitments.
evidence_snippet_2: From 2023 to 2024, NAM’s carbon intensity (scope 1+2) was reduced by 9.5%. By the end of 2024, 81% of top-200 carbon footprint contributors were aligned or subject to active engagement to become aligned with the Paris agreement.

top_issue: Low data coverage and estimation issues
evidence_snippet_1: Our investments are subject to norm-based screening, which identifies investee companies that have been involved in violations of the UN Global Compact principles or OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises.
evidence_snippet_2: During 2024, 13 issuers were flagged for allegations of violating international norms. In depth engagement processes were conducted with 5 of the issuers.

top_issue: Low data coverage and estimation issues
evidence_snippet_1: Our investments are subject to norm-based screening, which identifies investee companies that have been involved in violations of the UN Global Compact principles or OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises.
evidence_snippet_2: Share of investments in investee companies without policies to monitor compliance with the UNGC principles or OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises or grievance/ complaints handling mechanisms to address violations of the UNGC principles or OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises. Data coverage: 84,95%

top_issue: Low data coverage and estimation uncertainty
evidence_snippet_1: Our holdings are screened on an ongoing basis for exposure to controversial weapons.
evidence_snippet_2: Data coverage: 84,82%

top_issue: Generic policy description with limited specific actions and data coverage concerns
evidence_snippet_1: We have developed certain ESG positions around these four core areas to describe the requirements that we have on investee companies in relation hereto.
evidence_snippet_2: The PAI indicators that we consider are aligned with our ESG positions and are subject to data quality and availability.
